---
title: "Blog"
description: "Lukas Mayer's personal blog - tech tips, life-style recommendations, software development, research, data science"
listing:
  id: main-listing
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [image, date, title, description, reading-time]
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: [title, date]
  categories: true
  feed: true
  page-size: 4
format: 
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
.description {
    display: none;
}
</style>


<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    // Find the element containing the categories
    var categoryContent = document.querySelector("#quarto-margin-sidebar");

    // Find the sidebar where we want to move the categories
    var sidebar = document.querySelector("#quarto-sidebar");

    // Move the content to the sidebar without changing any positioning
    if (categoryContent && sidebar) {
        sidebar.appendChild(categoryContent);

        // Ensure no additional styles are applied that affect the layout
        categoryContent.style.position = "static"; // Keep it in normal flow
        categoryContent.style.transition = "none"; // Disable any transitions
    }

    // Pagination handling
    const paginationNav = document.querySelector('#main-listing-pagination');

    if (paginationNav) {
        paginationNav.querySelectorAll('a.page-link').forEach(function(link) {
            link.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
                event.preventDefault();

                // Fade out the pagination before loading new content
                paginationNav.style.transition = 'opacity 0.5s ease';
                paginationNav.style.opacity = '0';

                // Simulate content loading and then fade in the pagination
                setTimeout(function() {
                    // Here, you would load your content. Simulating with a delay.
                    // For example, you might use fetch to load new content.

                    // Ensure the pagination is fully faded out before fading in
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        paginationNav.style.opacity = '1';
                    }, 50); // Slight delay to ensure the fade-out completes
                }, 500); // Adjust the timing if necessary to match content load time
            });
        });
    }
});


</script>


{{< animate zoomIn "A dedicated space for me to rant!" duration=2s >}}


:::{#main-listing}
:::

Follow my blog with RSS
<a href="blog_index.xml" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-rss"></i>
</a>
